# format: html5-dom-v2
# status: active

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="title" attrs=[]
        "Tom & Jerry <b>"
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="section" attrs=[]
        element ns=html local="textarea" attrs=[]
          "A&B<x>"
        element ns=html local="p" attrs=[]
          element ns=html local="em" attrs=[]
            "ok"
